finding: anthropic arm builds req with .header(anthropic-version, ai_providers::ANTHROPIC_VERSION) and that same req is sent, so the header reaches GET /v1/models
ANTHROPIC_VERSION is exactly 2023-06-01 and the 3 chat/upload/delete literals were replaced with the same const, so emitted header bytes are byte-identical (no behavior change)
display_name fallback originally keyed on key-absence so a null/non-string name would short-circuit; FIXED to fall back whenever name is not a usable string
anthropic-version is a non-secret constant; api_key still travels only in x-api-key and is never logged; SSRF/redirect/no_proxy posture unchanged
missing display_name -> None, display_name==id -> filtered to None, empty/non-string -> None; no panic path; empty api_key just sends empty header
pub use providers::anthropic::ANTHROPIC_VERSION compiles (pub mod anthropic under a private mod providers is reachable by crate root); change is additive, not breaking
the wiremock anthropic-version + x-api-key matchers are the sole gate; removing the handler header -> default 404 -> model absent -> .expect panics, so no false-negative
claude-probe-test-model is absent from known_models.json so source==discovery is guaranteed; no dependence on env/network/ordering (loopback mock + LLM_DISCOVER_ALLOW_LOOPBACK)
no Rust integration test covered the probe-failure -> note-present + catalog-retained path; FIXED by adding discover_anthropic_probe_failure_keeps_catalog_and_notes
display_name==id/empty and null-name fallback were unit-untested; FIXED by display_name_equal_to_id_or_empty_is_dropped and null_name_falls_back_to_display_name
ANTHROPIC_VERSION is SCREAMING_SNAKE, doc-comment + re-export comment styles match neighbors, new snake_case test names fit the module; no ziee-chat/phibya/Claude references introduced

minimal correct change (one const, one re-export, value-identical replacements); the only remaining 2023-06-01 literal is the test wiremock matcher, kept intentionally as an independent wire-value assertion
no needless allocation; display_name or_else is lazy, header value is a &'static str passed by reference
discovery was the only live Anthropic request path missing the header; chat/upload/delete already sent it and now share the const; no anthropic-compatible second provider exists
inline POST /api/llm-providers payload matches createProviderViaAPI; deliberate (helper cannot force an invalid key), assignProviderToAdministratorsGroup correctly invoked before goToProviderDetail
no doc/memory update warranted: internal backend fix, honors ziee naming, aligns with prefer-minimal memory; a memory note would itself be over-engineering
